title: Interior
content:
I and myself swore enmity.    Alack,
        Myself has tied my hands behind my back.
        Yielding, I know there's no excuse in them, 
        I was accomplice to the stratagem.
meaning:
"Interior" is a quintessential example of John Collings Squire, Sir's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
